title: M365 Coordinator and Support Agent Capability Model
scope: Local planning model for governed read-write M365 agent capability. This file does not grant permissions, create apps, send mail, invite guests, or change tenant policy.
principles: Purpose-built access, not inherited setup power.
Read/propose/log first; write only through named governance lanes.
External sends, guest invites, sharing changes, app consent, tenant policy, destructive deletes, and calendar commitments require human approval.
Every meaningful action must land in Agent Action Log and, when policy or scope changes, Decision Register.

governanceLevels.name: Read Only
governanceLevels.description: Inventory, classify, summarize, and detect gaps. No M365 writes.

governanceLevels.name: Propose And Log
governanceLevels.description: Create draft recommendations and Suggested Agent Action Log rows only.

governanceLevels.name: Approved Internal Write
governanceLevels.description: Create or update internal operating records after a named approval gate.

governanceLevels.name: Restricted External Or Access Write
governanceLevels.description: External messages, public/client forms, guest access, sharing, permissions, app grants, and tenant policy changes.

governanceLevels.name: Blocked Autonomous Action
governanceLevels.description: Secrets, break-glass accounts, destructive tenant actions, broad grants, anonymous sharing, and unattended client-impacting commitments.

agents.name: M365 Coordinator
agents.persona: Internal operating coordinator for Guided AI Labs
agents.targetMode: Purpose-built Entra app or UAOS adapter after Stage 9 approval

allowedWrites: update lifecycle checklist items after approval
create/update supervised Planner tasks after approval

agents.name: M365 Support Agent
agents.persona: Support intake and resolution assistant for Change Leadership Tools
agents.targetMode: Scoped mailbox/list adapter after support MFA and Stage 9 approval
readSurfaces: support mailbox metadata and approved message bodies

allowedWrites: create draft replies only after approval
create/update supervised support follow-up tasks after approval

blockedActions: send external email without Adam approval
change support mailbox forwarding or delegates
collect sensitive client data through public forms

permissionLanes.description: Use Adam-approved interactive Graph/PnP sessions and typed approval gates for first write loops.
Use Selected scopes plus explicit site/list grants for durable app-based List and SharePoint access.
fit: selected Change Leadership Tools Support Register

permissionLanes.description: Use Exchange Online Application RBAC to scope mailbox access for app-based support processing.
Existing setup-helper grants such as AllSites.FullControl and Group.ReadWrite.All.

firstLiveLoopCandidates.name: Read intake state and create a suggested Agent Action Log row
firstLiveLoopCandidates.exitCriteria: A suggested row exists, links to source context, and no restricted action occurred.

firstLiveLoopCandidates.name: Create a supervised support triage row and draft response evidence
firstLiveLoopCandidates.exitCriteria: A support row and log row exist; no external email was sent.

approvalGates.action: Create Suggested Agent Action Log row
Create or update internal List row

approvalGates.evidenceTarget: Decision Register and Agent Action Log

approvalGates.action: Change sharing, guests, permissions, app consent, or tenant policy
approvalGates.evidenceTarget: Decision Register and Agent Action Log

rolloutSequence.name: Finish Stage 8 command-center draft review
rolloutSequence.doneWhen: Draft page is created, read-back verified, and browser-reviewed.

rolloutSequence.name: Record Stage 9 capability decision
rolloutSequence.doneWhen: Decision Register records coordinator/support scope and blocked actions.

rolloutSequence.name: Run G1 coordinator loop
rolloutSequence.doneWhen: Coordinator creates only a Suggested Agent Action Log row.

rolloutSequence.name: Run G2 support triage loop
rolloutSequence.doneWhen: Support row and log row are created after approval; no external send occurs.

rolloutSequence.name: Choose app posture
rolloutSequence.doneWhen: Adam chooses delegated-only, Selected permissions, Exchange App RBAC, or a mixed adapter path.

rolloutSequence.name: Create separate app registrations if needed
rolloutSequence.doneWhen: Apps are created through a separate approval-gated operator and do not reuse agent-pnp-provisioning.

sourceNotes.title: Overview of Selected permissions in OneDrive and SharePoint
Role Based Access Control for Applications in Exchange Online
